replies.msg:
Thank you for your inquiry.

GARP will be emailing candidates in the coming weeks regarding the exam that is scheduled to take place on 24 October as well as 21 November 2020.

We ask you remain vigilant of the website for updates and important information regarding the October 2020 exam date.

We thank you for your cooperation in this matter. Best of luck to you!


If you have any other questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact Member Services at GARP.



Sincerely,


Jill Greb
Member Services Representative
Global Association of Risk Professionals (GARP)
111 Town Square Place, 14th Floor
Jersey City, NJ 07310
